activity.description: Triggers instantly when an event has occured

inputs.name: text
inputs.value: Thanks — I've got the media, the issue and the asset. Analysing now.

inputs.name: latest_message
inputs.description: Newest worker message (may be empty if media-only)
inputs.title: Latest Message

inputs.name: has_media
inputs.description: True if a photo/video has arrived so far
inputs.title: Has Media

inputs.name: current_issue_text
inputs.description: Issue gathered so far (carried forward)
inputs.title: Current Issue Text

inputs.name: current_asset_id
inputs.description: Validated asset gathered so far (carried forward)
inputs.title: Current Asset Id

inputs.name: caseId
inputs.description: FOREMAN case id (the case's external key). Routing key for the live UI feed; map this to the Maestro Case ID expression. Optional.
inputs.title: Caseid

inputs.name: case_id
inputs.description: FOREMAN case id (external key) — routing key for the live UI feed; map to the Maestro Case ID expression
inputs.title: Case Id

inputs.name: case
inputs.description: supervisor.case {asset_id, site_id, worker_text, ...}
inputs.title: Case

inputs.name: diagnosis
inputs.description: supervisor.diagnosis {root_cause, confidence, ...}
inputs.title: Diagnosis

inputs.name: risk
inputs.description: supervisor.risk {band, score, ...}
inputs.title: Risk

inputs.name: invoked
inputs.description: supervisor.invoked[] (holds fleet_blast_radius result)
inputs.title: Invoked

inputs.name: not_invoked
inputs.description: supervisor.not_invoked[] (holds warranty why)
inputs.title: Not Invoked

inputs.name: action_plan
inputs.description: supervisor.action_plan[] {order, category, action}
inputs.title: Action Plan

inputs.name: summary
inputs.description: supervisor.summary (fallback email body)
inputs.title: Summary

inputs.name: report_url
inputs.description: supervisor.report_url — the SOP PDF to attach
inputs.title: Report Url

inputs.name: spoken_opener
inputs.description: voice.spoken_opener
inputs.title: Spoken Opener

inputs.name: spoken_recommendation
inputs.description: voice.spoken_recommendation
inputs.title: Spoken Recommendation

inputs.name: transcript
inputs.description: voice.transcript[] (call turns)
inputs.title: Transcript

inputs.name: decision
inputs.description: voice.decision (approved/hold/...)
inputs.title: Decision

inputs.name: call_sid
inputs.description: voice.call_sid
inputs.title: Call Sid

inputs.name: call_to
inputs.description: voice.to — the number called
inputs.title: Call To

inputs.name: call_from
inputs.description: voice.from_ — the calling number
inputs.title: Call From

inputs.name: recording_url
inputs.description: voice.recording_url — URL of the call recording (mp3) to download + attach
inputs.title: Recording Url

inputs.name: decision_context
inputs.description: Override describing the human/voice decision
inputs.title: Decision Context

inputs.name: recipients
inputs.description: Comma-separated To addresses
inputs.title: Recipients

inputs.name: cc
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated Cc addresses
inputs.title: Cc

inputs.name: media_blob_path
inputs.description: Video blob path in the bucket, e.g. MM....mp4
inputs.title: Media Blob Path

inputs.name: media_bucket
inputs.description: Storage Bucket name holding the video
inputs.title: Media Bucket

inputs.name: media_folder
inputs.description: Folder the bucket lives in
inputs.title: Media Folder

inputs.name: max_attachment_mb
inputs.description: Skip any attachment larger than this (Gmail ~25MB)
inputs.title: Max Attachment Mb

inputs.name: dry_run
inputs.description: Compose + build attachments but DO NOT send
inputs.title: Dry Run

inputs.name: mediaPath
inputs.description: Path/key of the media file inside the bucket
inputs.title: Mediapath

inputs.name: mediaType
inputs.description: MIME type, e.g. 'image/jpeg' or 'video/mp4'
inputs.title: Mediatype

inputs.name: assetId
inputs.description: Asset identifier, e.g. 'AST-SCB-DEL-0788'
inputs.title: Assetid

inputs.name: issueText
inputs.description: Worker-reported issue text from intake (optional; grounds the vision)
inputs.title: Issuetext

inputs.name: caseId
inputs.description: FOREMAN case id (the case's external key). Routing key for the live UI feed; map this to the Maestro Case ID expression. Optional.
inputs.title: Caseid

outputs.name: issue_text_received
outputs.description: The worker-reported issue text the agent received (echoed for visibility)
outputs.title: Issue Text Received

_jsonSchema.description: Structured fault perception parsed from the vision model
_jsonSchema.title: Perception

body.description: Structured fault perception parsed from the vision model
body.title: Perception

_jsonSchema.description: How the top fault relates to this asset's prior issue history
_jsonSchema.title: History Match

body.description: How the top fault relates to this asset's prior issue history
body.title: History Match

outputs.name: history_logged
outputs.description: True if a new AssetIssueHistory record was written this run
outputs.title: History Logged

outputs.name: history_logged_error
outputs.description: Error detail if the auto-log write failed (empty when fine)
outputs.title: History Logged Error

inputs.name: caseId
inputs.description: FOREMAN case id (the case's external key). Routing key for the live UI feed; map this to the Maestro Case ID expression. Optional.
inputs.title: Caseid

inputs.name: to_number
inputs.description: Callee E.164, verified on Twilio trial
inputs.title: To Number

inputs.name: summary
inputs.description: Full case summary (long) -> LLM compresses + derives
inputs.title: Summary

inputs.name: to_role
inputs.description: Who is being called, for context
inputs.title: To Role

inputs.name: asset_id
inputs.description: Asset id to lead the opener with, e.g. AST-SCB-DEL-0788
inputs.title: Asset Id

inputs.name: site_id
inputs.description: Site id (fallback id for the opener), for context
inputs.title: Site Id

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Subject of the call, for context
inputs.title: Title

inputs.name: message_override
inputs.description: If set, speak this opener verbatim and SKIP the opener LLM
inputs.title: Message Override

inputs.name: voice
inputs.description: Twilio <Say> voice (alice/man/woman or Polly.*)
inputs.title: Voice

inputs.name: from_number
inputs.description: Twilio VOICE number (NOT the WhatsApp sandbox)
inputs.title: From Number
